events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario: condenser/heat pump setting, clearance to wall/other units below mfr minimum. This is non-compliant with manufacturer requirements and code (IMC/IRC M1401 requires equipment installed per manufacturer's instructions). Work is rough-complete. Decision should be fail. Risk: medium-high. Component conditions: non-compliant, possibly installed-defective. Percent complete maybe 80. Confidence high.
